## 💡 Description
## 🔗 Related Issue
Closes #

## 🚀 Type of change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement (Changes to Toast, Banner, Dialog, etc.)
- [ ] 🤖 CI/CD or Repository chore

## 🛡️ Open-Core & Architecture Checklist
- [ ] I have NOT altered the network payload sent to the CogniCatch API, or I have discussed this change in an Issue first.
- [ ] I have NOT bypassed or removed any PII sanitization logic.

## ✅ Developer Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (I ran `pnpm run check:fix` using Biome).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests for my changes (if applicable).
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally (`pnpm run test`).
- [ ] My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits specification.

## 📸 Screenshots / Video (if applicable)
